content.en:
"Another top rift has opened!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

It seems that today's territorial sea boundary barriers are really very fragile, causing one boundary gap to be opened one by one.

Soon, he knew the name of this top boundary seam, the Yahe Boundary Seam.

The Yahe Boundary Rift is also a top boundary rift, slightly weaker than the Hunhe Boundary Rift, and it is also one of the three top boundary rifts that invaded the territorial sea boundary rift at the beginning.

The crack in the Yahe Boundary opened, and Ye Tian was not only not nervous, but a little excited.

"I just think that there are not many ancient gold inscriptions, the Yahe boundary crack is the top boundary seam, there must be ancient gold inscriptions, but you can mix in it and understand more ancient gold inscriptions. Ye Tian thought to himself.

He also decided to enter the Swire Golden Text, trying to find a suitable resource for him.

Let's see if we can scrape together the resources to transform one of his immeasurable bones, and now he only has four immeasurable bones left that have not been transformed.

Dark Sea.

Ye Tian was chatting with the Lord of Darkness, and by the way, he learned some information and intelligence about the Yahe Boundary Rift from the Lord of Darkness.

And the Lord of Darkness knew that Ye Tian was going to enter the Yahe Realm, and he also told Ye Tian specific information, but these information may be outdated, so he also asked Ye Tian not to fully believe this information.

"Lord of Darkness, will the Yahe Boundary Rift learn from the Hunhe Boundary Rift and directly integrate into the territorial sea Boundary Rift?" Ye Tian asked casually.

"Probably not!" the Lord of Darkness shook his head, "We have just discussed the Bone Transformation Realm, and the Lord of the Cave Void has also calculated, and the Territorial Sea Boundary Rift is currently in a state of digesting the territory of the Hunhe River Boundary Rift, and is in the process of being upgraded. In this case, even if the boundary barrier of the territorial sea is fragile, the resistance to the outside world is very strong, and it is difficult for the Yahe boundary to squeeze in. "

"I see!

Ye Tian nodded.

As long as the Yahe boundary seam does not integrate into the territorial sea boundary seam, the pressure of the territorial sea boundary seam is very small, otherwise it really can't withstand the pressure of the two top boundary seams.

After finishing his chat with the Lord of Darkness, he went straight to the Rift of the Rim River.

Just as he was about to enter the Yahe Realm Rift, he ran into a Bone Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor.

"It's him, Lord of the Void!"

Ye Tian was surprised that this No. 1 powerhouse in the territorial sea boundary crack was also going to the Yahe boundary seam.

"I've seen the Lord of the Void!"

Ye Tian said respectfully.

The Lord of the Cave Void saw Ye Tian and looked at it, "You are the Endless Heavenly Ancestor of the Dark Sea, it's really good, you're about to break through to the Bone Transformation Realm." "

"Lord of the Void, you also want to enter the Yahe Boundary Rift?"

Ye Tian asked curiously.

"Yes!" "Yes!" the Lord of the Cave Void sighed, "There's no way, those bone transformation realms in the Hunhe Boundary Crack will come out in a few primeval eras, and we won't be able to stop it when the time comes, I'll go to the Yahe Boundary Crack to see if there is any chance, if I can break through to the five blood transformation realms, I will have the confidence to fight against those top overlord-level forces in the Hunhe River Boundary Crack." At the very least, everyone can sit down and talk, and there will be no conflict. "

Ye Tian instantly admired the Lord of the Cave Void, after all, the Lord of the Cave Void was a lonely person, without the drag of power and race, he could run away alone at any time, regardless of other forces.

However, he did.

"Let's go, let's go in together!"

The main path of the void.

Whew!!

Ye Tian and the Lord of the Cave Void entered the crack of the Yahe Realm together.

......

The seam of the river boundary.

As soon as Ye Tiangang came in, he found himself in a sea of red.

"Where is this?"

Ye Tian didn't know much about this.

Wow!

The Lord of the Void appeared next to him and looked around: "This is the Red Dragon Sea of the Yahe Boundary Sea, and it is the territory of the Red Dragon Clan of the Yahe Boundary Seam. I'm gone, you be careful. The Red Dragon Clan has several bone transformation realms. "

Swish!

The Void Lord's form vanished and left the place.

"It turned out to be the territory of the Red Dragon Clan!"

Ye Tian knew that the Red Dragon Clan, the Lord of Darkness had briefly mentioned it.

There are a total of six top overlord-level forces in the Yahe Realm, although there are not many top-level overlord-level forces, but each of them is very powerful, among which the Red Dragon Clan belongs to the weakest one of the top overlord-level forces.

Yahe Palace!

Ancient Demon City!

Nine Domains Alliance!

The Sea of Osan Mountains!

Night River House!

Plus the Red Dragons.

These are the six top hegemon-level forces in the Yahe Realm,

Among them, Yahe Palace is the most powerful, and if you can use the name of Yahe Boundary as the name of the force, you can see the horror of this force.

According to the introduction of the Lord of Darkness, the foundation of Yahe Palace is far inferior to a force like the Chaos Ruin Cave, because Yahe Palace has gathered the resources and geniuses of most of the territory of the entire Yahe Realm, and the number of bone transformation realms it has reached double digits.

It is precisely because of this that the other five top overlord-level forces in the Yahe Realm can only surrender to Yahe Palace, and even give up their interests, not daring to offend Yahe Palace.

Of course, this is primeval intelligence.

He still has to know what the situation is now.

Swish!

Ye Tian left this area and soon discovered an eight-time Blood Transformation Realm creature, but it was not a red dragon creature.

He immediately struck, killed the other party in an instant, and then copied the other party's body, and then walked in this red dragon sea as the other party.

And Ye Tian's true body copy body is hidden, and he is not ready to act, otherwise it will be troublesome if he encounters the bone transformation realm.

He doesn't have the strength of the Lord of the Cave Void, the Lord of the Cave Void is a boundary-breaking genius of the Fourth Bone Transformation Realm, even if he is in the Yahe Realm, he can save his life, unless he is besieged by a large number of Bone Transformation Realm, he will not even have any hope of escaping.

But he can't, once he encounters any bone transformation realm, don't even think about running away.

Therefore, it is better not to go out for his real body replica body, so as not to startle the snake.

......

Ye Tian walked in the Red Dragon Sea as this replica body Gu Lou Heavenly Ancestor, and soon came to an island area, where there were many creatures in the Blood Transformation Realm, as well as some cities.

After entering here, he didn't do anything, only to know the intelligence.

Soon, he got a shocking piece of news.

The Red Dragons have been wiped out!

It was Yahe Palace that made the shot, and several bone transformation realms of the red dragon clan were directly killed, and even a red dragon did not exist in the entire Yahe Realm now.

"Such a powerful top overlord-level force is gone?"

Ye Tian was extremely surprised.

After he learned the reason, he knew why the Red Dragon Clan was wiped out, the reason was very simple, that is, the Red Dragon Clan had chased and killed a weak Blood Transformation Realm creature, but he didn't expect the other party to join the Yahe Palace, and later cultivated to the Bone Transformation Realm three times, and he was an ancient-level genius.

This combat power is comparable to the Lord of the Void Void in the Four Blood Transformation Realms!

Therefore, that primitive-level genius became one of the three deputy palace masters of Yahe Palace, so he directly took action to destroy the Red Dragon Clan.
